description:
The diagram presents a wide, flat horizontal pipeline, designed with a 16:9 aspect ratio, embodying a clean academic NeurIPS style with minimal, impactful text. The overall flow progresses from left to right, divided into two distinct, side-by-side sections.

The left section is enclosed within a large, horizontally oriented bounding box with a soft, warm red background, labeled "PCD Diagnosis" in a clear sans-serif font at its top center. Inside this section, three rounded rectangular components are arranged horizontally, connected by arrows. The first component on the left is a standard-sized rounded rectangle with a pale coral fill, labeled "Parse ✓ (82-100%)". A thick, bold red solid arrow, signifying a bottleneck, extends from the right side of the "Parse" box to the left side of the central component. This central component is a slightly larger, emphasized rounded rectangle with a slightly darker, more saturated pale red fill and a prominent, bold red border, labeled "Compute ✗ (22-78%)". From the right side of the "Compute" box, a standard solid black arrow points to the left side of the third component. The third component, positioned on the far right of this section, is a standard-sized rounded rectangle with a pale coral fill, labeled "Decide ✓ (100%)". All text within these boxes uses a clear sans-serif font.

To the right of the "PCD Diagnosis" section, the second main section is contained within an equally large, horizontally oriented bounding box with a soft, cool blue background, labeled "Compile-Once Pipeline" in a clear sans-serif font at its top center. This section features a horizontal flow of five rounded rectangular components. The first component on the far left is a standard-sized rounded rectangle with a pale azure fill, labeled "1 Example". A standard solid black arrow connects its right side to the left side of the next component. This second component is a slightly larger rounded rectangle with a slightly darker, more saturated pale blue fill, labeled "LLM Inductor (GPT-4o-mini, $0.008)". A standard solid black arrow extends from its right side to the left side of the third component. The third component is a standard-sized rounded rectangle with a pale azure fill, labeled "TaskSpec (JSON)". A standard solid black arrow connects its right side to the left side of the fourth component. The fourth component is a standard-sized rounded rectangle with a slightly darker, more saturated pale blue fill, labeled "Compiler (7 ops)". A standard solid black arrow points from its right side to the left side of the final component in the main flow. This fifth and final component is a slightly larger rounded rectangle with a pale mint green fill and a subtle, slightly darker mint green border, labeled "Exact Solver (100%)". A small, unobtrusive text annotation, "no LLM at test time", is positioned just below this "Exact Solver" box. Below and slightly to the left of the "Compiler" box, a smaller rounded rectangle with a pale azure fill is positioned, labeled "3-Gate Verifier". A dashed black arrow originates from the right side of this "3-Gate Verifier" box and curves upwards and to the left, forming a feedback loop by pointing to the left side of the "TaskSpec (JSON)" box. All text within these boxes and annotations uses a clear sans-serif font.

A crucial connection between the two main sections is represented by a dashed black arrow, labeled "motivates" in a sans-serif font. This arrow originates from the bottom center of the "Compute ✗ (22-78%)" box within the "PCD Diagnosis" section and extends horizontally to the right, pointing towards the bottom center of the "LLM Inductor (GPT-4o-mini, $0.008)" box within the "Compile-Once Pipeline" section.

The entire diagram maintains a professional, elegant, and publication-ready aesthetic, utilizing rounded rectangles for all components, a consistent sans-serif font throughout, and subtle pastel fills, with minimal text inside the boxes focusing on key names and single numbers.
